task_completion.description: The 'Apex Q4 Supply Chain Automation' opportunity record is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the CRM interface displaying the Opportunity detail view for 'Apex Q4 Supply Chain Automation'.

task_completion.description: Eleanor Vance is linked to the opportunity with the correct role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see 'Eleanor Vance' listed in the Contacts subpanel/section of the opportunity, with the Opportunity Role explicitly set to 'Executive Sponsor'.

task_completion.description: Marcus Thorne is linked to the opportunity with the correct role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see 'Marcus Thorne' listed in the Contacts subpanel/section of the opportunity, with the Opportunity Role explicitly set to 'Primary Decision Maker'.

task_completion.description: David Chen is linked to the opportunity with the correct role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see 'David Chen' listed in the Contacts subpanel/section of the opportunity, with the Opportunity Role explicitly set to 'Technical Evaluator'.

task_completion.description: All changes are saved and visible in the opportunity record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see the final, saved state of the Opportunity record (not in an active edit mode) displaying all three contacts and their assigned roles in the Contacts subpanel.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the CRM via the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should see a web browser displaying the CRM interface, with no evidence of terminal commands, API calls, or database scripts being used to insert the data.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual CRM application rather than a text editor or mock page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should see standard CRM UI elements, menus, and subpanels, rather than a generic text editor or a locally created HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The VLM should ensure the browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/DevTools) are not open and being used to alter the text on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Opportunity: 'Apex Q4 Supply Chain Automation'. Expected Contacts and Roles: Eleanor Vance must be 'Executive Sponsor', Marcus Thorne must be 'Primary Decision Maker', and David Chen must be 'Technical Evaluator'.
